anatomyPart.name: container
anatomyPart.description: The outer wrapper element that defines the button's clickable area and visual boundary.

anatomyPart.name: label
anatomyPart.description: The text content of the button. Communicates the action that will occur when activated.

anatomyPart.name: icon
anatomyPart.description: An optional icon displayed before (leading) or after (trailing) the label. Reinforces the label's meaning visually.

anatomyPart.name: focus-ring
anatomyPart.description: A visible outline that appears when the button receives keyboard focus. Must be visible in all color modes.

anatomy.description: The Button is composed of a container, a text label, and an optional leading or trailing icon. A focus ring appears on keyboard focus.
